dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The alignment-engine step failed schema validation by providing a string value ('partially_aligned') for a field ('overall_status') explicitly defined as an integer in the schema. This is a direct violation of the structural governance and contract enforcement required for the orchestration flow.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The agent demonstrated high reasoning depth in the architecture-work-to-evolution-map and architecture-intent-generator steps, successfully processing large token contexts (over 74k total) to establish logical links between work items and architectural evolution. The flow logic remained coherent despite the validation error in a parallel/sequential step.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: While the architecture-intent-generator successfully produced an AID, the failure of the alignment-engine significantly hampered the agent's ability to formally surface and report on tensions against the project's specific ruleset. The resolution of trade-offs was performed but not correctly documented per the governance schema.
